closure_text: 1440 admits 18 factor pairs (a <= b). Of these, 1 matches the canonical GCT-derived (N_cage, N_C3) = (144, 10) pathway; 3 represent INDEPENDENT icosahedral combinatorial pathways with both factors in the icosahedral dictionary; 1 are trivial (one factor = 1); 13 involve arithmetic-coincidence factors. The Higgs VEV derivation is non-unique in factorisation; the canonical muon-defect-saturation pathway is the registered Tier 2 mechanism, while the 1440 handle remains Tier 3 until upstream uniqueness problems close. Other factorisations are dimensional cross-checks at the order-of-magnitude level.
